title: alstroemeria gouveiana
intro: Alstroemeria gouveiana, also known as the Peruvian Lily or Parrot's Beak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is native to the Andes and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alstroemeria gouveiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve its flowers or roots being used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
